case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. SYRENE C WILLIAMS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,065.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, SYRENE C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-24-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL-COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2014 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, SYRENE C $4,065.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,115.99, DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT IN APPLYING FOR AND ILLEGALLY RECEIVING CALWORKS BENEFITS FOR WHICH SHE KNEW SHE WAS NOT ENTITLED CONSTITUTES FRAUD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
